resources.string: The crystal staff shatters. Bare fists only.
CRYSTAL STAFF BREAKS UNDER BARE FIST.

No spells. No hidden knives. No shots from the hill. Iron and brass stride through the fire. Heads unbowed. The distance closes. The staff shatters. The shield is torn by bare hands. Steel meets steel. The sparks tell the only truth: face to face, eye to eye, bone under iron.
NO SPELL. NO HIDDEN KNIFE. NO SAFE SHOT. BLACK IRON ADVANCES. DISTANCE CLOSES. STAFF SHATTERS. SHIELD TEARS. FACE TO FACE. BONE UNDER IRON.
Iron crushes magic. Only the strike is true.
METAL CRUSHES MAGIC. ONLY THE SWING IS TRUE.

Wards fold like paper. Cores are crushed to dust. They hide behind tricks and sorcery. The iron plate does not yield. It walks through fire. It ignores cowardice. When the blade falls, the lie ends. No magic saves you when the iron splits the bone. This is the only honest death.
SHIELDS FOLD LIKE PAPER. CORES CRUSHED TO DUST. HEAVY ARMOR WALKS THROUGH FIRE. NO MAGIC SAVES YOU. IRON SPLITS BONE. THE ONLY HONEST DEATH.
